results.title: Henderson issues injury update after surgery
results.description: Brentford midfielder Jordan Henderson has issued an update after undergoing surgery on an injury sustained following England’s win over Mexico on Monday.The 36-year-old is part of the Three Lions’...

results.title: On the spot: Are World Cup penalties getting worse?
results.description: New Delhi: Earlier than masterminding a surprising 3-2 comeback win over Egypt, Lionel Messi had his penalty saved by Moustafa Shobeir within the twenty first minute. Having already did not convert a penalty within the group stage match towards Austria, Messi grew to become the primary participant in World Cup historical past to overlook a [...] The post On the spot: Are World Cup penalties getting worse? appeared first on Asia Today .

results.title: From the Sports Desk: Argentina’s great escape
results.description: Lionel Messi scored another goal — his eighth of the tournament — to help his team to one of the great World Cup comebacks, a 3-2 win over Egypt despite trailing by two with only 11 minutes of regulation time to play.

results.title: SHOE REVIEW: Altra Escalante 5
